T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
12 
APLCTN_DT 
LABEL: 
Provider Medicaid or CHIP Program Application Date 
DESCRIPTION: The date on which the provider applied for enrollment into the state’s Medicaid and/or CHIP program. 
SHORT NAME: APLCTN_DT 
LONG NAME: APLCTN_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
FILE(S): 
APR enrollment 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g.,
